name: BB:Database: User Addition or Change
notes: Edit this BB to add events that show the successful addition or change of user privileges.
bb_references: BB:Database: User Addition or Change on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Account Added, Authentication.User Account Changed
when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Database Servers, BB:HostReference: Database Servers
TD_list: APPLY BB:Database: User Addition or Change on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Account Added, Authentication.User Account Changed
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Database Servers, BB:HostReference: Database Servers
